input: user-item interaction graphs from multiple markets (domains) with overlapping items
output: ranked item recommendations for users in target (data-insufficient) markets
loss: multi-task learning (BPR loss + self-supervised contrastive loss)
key_idea: self-supervised graph learning with market-aware and market-unaware dropout to learn generalized representations robust to noise and bias
datasets: seven pairs of real-world datasets (e.g., Amazon cross-market pairs)
